raw.message: Test your skills in epic clan wars to prove you are the best 🏅

hook.summary: A 3D Barbarian character slams a desk and screams, followed by a montage of real people screaming.
hook.visual_action: The Barbarian slams his hands on a wooden desk in a grand hall and lets out a loud battle cry.

scene_flow: A 3D-rendered Barbarian character slams a desk and screams in a formal hall setting.
A fast-paced montage shows diverse people in real-world locations (Times Square, gas station, newsroom) screaming in unison.
Cinematic wide shot of a fortified base at night with 'Attack 2026' text overlay.
Final end card featuring the Clash of Clans logo and a 'Play Now' button.
audience_proxy: Competitive mobile gamers who enjoy high-energy community events and large-scale strategy games.
